card.description: The Oilers apparently will have defenseman Mattias Ekholm back in their lineup for Game 5 of the Western Conference finals against the Stars.
card.title: Oilers' Ekholm set for return in Game 5 vs. Stars

external.description: The Oilers apparently will have defenseman Mattias Ekholm back in their lineup for Game 5 of the Western Conference finals against the Stars.
external.title: Oilers' Ekholm set for return in Game 5 vs. Stars

record.text:
Oilers' defenseman Mattias Ekholm is set to return to action Thursday for Game 5 of the Western Conference finals against the Stars.

Ekholm has been out of the Oilers' lineup since April 11 with an undisclosed injury.
